description: Build QuantTube (YouTube + Spotify + Netflix hybrid) and QuantNeon (Instagram-like with mini games and AR/VR). These share media infrastructure and are the ecosystem's primary content consumption apps.
steps: Create apps/quantube/package.json and apps/quantube/tsconfig.json
Create apps/quantube/api/server.ts - Express server setup
Create apps/quantube/api/routes/videos.ts - Upload, process, stream videos, shorts, live streams, premieres
Create apps/quantube/api/routes/music.ts - Music streaming, albums, artists, playlists, radio, lyrics, podcasts
Create apps/quantube/api/routes/shows.ts - Series, episodes, seasons, watch progress, downloads, originals
Create apps/quantube/api/routes/channels.ts - Creator channels, subscriptions, memberships, community posts
Create apps/quantube/api/routes/playlists.ts - Create/manage playlists (video + music), collaborative playlists, auto-mix
Create apps/quantube/api/routes/interactions.ts - Like, comment, subscribe, share, save, watch later, history
Create apps/quantube/api/routes/live.ts - Live streaming, chat, donations, raids, clips
Create apps/quantube/api/routes/monetization.ts - Creator monetization, ads revenue, sponsorships, super chats
Create apps/quantube/api/routes/ai.ts - AI recommendations, auto-chapters, transcription, translation, content moderation
Create apps/quantube/api/routes/search.ts - Search videos, music, shows, channels with filters
Create apps/quantube/api/controllers/ - All controllers
Create apps/quantube/api/services/streaming-service.ts - Adaptive bitrate streaming, CDN management
Create apps/quantube/api/services/transcoding-service.ts - Video/audio transcoding pipeline
Create apps/quantube/api/services/recommendation-service.ts - AI-powered recommendations using packages/ai
Create apps/quantube/api/services/music-service.ts - Music metadata, audio processing, lyrics sync
Create apps/quantube/api/services/live-service.ts - Live stream management, WebRTC ingest
Create apps/quantube/api/services/creator-service.ts - Creator tools, analytics, monetization
Create apps/quantube/src/types/index.ts - QuantTube types
Create apps/quantube/src/pages/index.tsx - Home feed with video/music/show recommendations
Create apps/quantube/src/pages/watch/[id].tsx - Video player page with comments, related
Create apps/quantube/src/pages/music.tsx - Music player with queue, playlists, artists
Create apps/quantube/src/pages/shows.tsx - Shows/series catalog with categories
Create apps/quantube/src/pages/live.tsx - Live streams directory
Create apps/quantube/src/pages/channel/[id].tsx - Creator channel page
Create apps/quantube/src/pages/search.tsx - Search results with filters
Create apps/quantube/src/pages/library.tsx - User library (watch later, history, playlists, downloads)
Create apps/quantube/src/pages/upload.tsx - Content upload and management
Create apps/quantube/src/pages/studio.tsx - Creator studio dashboard
Create apps/quantube/src/components/VideoPlayer.tsx - Full-featured video player with chapters, subtitles, quality
Create apps/quantube/src/components/MusicPlayer.tsx - Music player with visualizer, queue, lyrics
Create apps/quantube/src/components/ContentGrid.tsx - Responsive grid for videos/shows/music
Create apps/quantube/src/components/LiveChat.tsx - Real-time live stream chat
Create apps/quantube/src/components/MiniPlayer.tsx - Picture-in-picture mini player
Create apps/quantube/src/components/Recommendations.tsx - AI recommendation sidebar
Create apps/quantube/src/services/api-client.ts - Frontend API client
--- QuantNeon ---
Create apps/quantneon/package.json and apps/quantneon/tsconfig.json
Create apps/quantneon/api/server.ts - Express server setup
Create apps/quantneon/api/routes/posts.ts - Photo/video posts, carousels, captions, tags, locations, collaborations
Create apps/quantneon/api/routes/reels.ts - Short-form video (reels), effects, audio, duets, stitches
Create apps/quantneon/api/routes/stories.ts - 24hr stories, interactive stickers, polls, questions, countdowns
Create apps/quantneon/api/routes/profiles.ts - User profiles, bio, highlights, grid, tagged, followers/following
Create apps/quantneon/api/routes/explore.ts - Explore feed, categories, trending, hashtags, locations
Create apps/quantneon/api/routes/messages.ts - Direct messages (integrate with QuantChat)
Create apps/quantneon/api/routes/shopping.ts - In-app shopping, product tags, stores, checkout
Create apps/quantneon/api/routes/games.ts - Mini games, AR games, multiplayer, leaderboards, rewards
Create apps/quantneon/api/routes/ar-vr.ts - AR filters, VR experiences, 3D posts, spatial content
Create apps/quantneon/api/routes/ai.ts - AI filters, content suggestions, caption generation, alt-text
Create apps/quantneon/api/routes/creators.ts - Creator tools, insights, branded content, collaborations
Create apps/quantneon/api/controllers/ - All controllers
Create apps/quantneon/api/services/media-service.ts - Image/video processing, filters, effects
Create apps/quantneon/api/services/feed-service.ts - Explore feed algorithm, content ranking
Create apps/quantneon/api/services/game-service.ts - Mini game engine, multiplayer, scoring
Create apps/quantneon/api/services/ar-service.ts - AR/VR content processing, 3D rendering interface
Create apps/quantneon/api/services/shopping-service.ts - E-commerce, inventory, payments
Create apps/quantneon/api/services/ai-service.ts - AI features using packages/ai
Create apps/quantneon/src/types/index.ts - QuantNeon types
Create apps/quantneon/src/pages/index.tsx - Main feed (posts from following)
Create apps/quantneon/src/pages/explore.tsx - Explore/discover grid with categories
Create apps/quantneon/src/pages/reels.tsx - Full-screen reels viewer (swipe)
Create apps/quantneon/src/pages/post/[id].tsx - Single post view with comments
Create apps/quantneon/src/pages/profile/[id].tsx - User profile grid
Create apps/quantneon/src/pages/games.tsx - Mini games hub
Create apps/quantneon/src/pages/game/[id].tsx - Individual game player
Create apps/quantneon/src/pages/shop.tsx - Shopping explore and product pages
Create apps/quantneon/src/pages/camera.tsx - Camera with AR filters and effects
Create apps/quantneon/src/pages/stories.tsx - Story viewer
Create apps/quantneon/src/pages/create.tsx - Content creation (post, reel, story)
Create apps/quantneon/src/components/PostGrid.tsx - Instagram-style photo grid
Create apps/quantneon/src/components/ReelPlayer.tsx - Full-screen vertical video player
Create apps/quantneon/src/components/StoryRing.tsx - Story ring with viewer
Create apps/quantneon/src/components/ARCamera.tsx - AR camera with filters
Create apps/quantneon/src/components/MiniGame.tsx - Mini game container/engine
Create apps/quantneon/src/components/ShoppingCard.tsx - Product card with purchase
Create apps/quantneon/src/components/FilterGallery.tsx - Photo/video filter gallery
Create apps/quantneon/src/services/api-client.ts - Frontend API client
acceptance_criteria: QuantTube has video upload, streaming with adaptive bitrate, and player with chapters/subtitles
Music streaming with playlists, albums, artists, lyrics, and queue management works
Shows/series system with episodes, seasons, and watch progress exists
Live streaming with real-time chat and creator tools is implemented
Creator monetization (ad revenue, memberships, super chats) exists
AI recommendations for video, music, and shows are integrated
QuantNeon has full photo/video posting with carousels, filters, and locations
Reels feature with effects, audio, duets is complete
Stories with interactive stickers (polls, questions, countdowns) exist
Mini games system with AR games, multiplayer, leaderboards works
AR/VR features (filters, 3D posts, spatial content) are implemented
In-app shopping with product tags, stores, checkout exists
Both apps integrate AI for recommendations and content features
findings: Both apps compile successfully (only tsconfig baseUrl deprecation warning which is shared pattern from all other apps). QuantTube: 46 TS/TSX files, 10 routes. QuantNeon: 52 TS/TSX files, 11 routes. NODE_OPTIONS must be cleared to run tsc due to sandbox proxy bootstrap module issue.
